MINI MINUTES: JPT Sigrid Irias; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp. is present. Represented by Mario Zuniga.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendanst Paulette Myszka and Armando Guleng are present.
Attorney Anthony Burchell appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of MAR-02-2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
